description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a tall, conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone features two broad, horizontal reflective silver stripes encircling its upper and middle sections, which are slightly weathered and show signs of use. The surface of the cone is matte with some visible scuff marks and dirt, indicating it has been used outdoors. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, seamlessly continuing from the conical body. The base is flat, thick, and slightly raised at the edges, designed to prevent tipping and provide a stable footprint on various surfaces. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A tall, orange traffic cone with two wide, weathered reflective silver stripes and a sturdy square base. The surface shows signs of outdoor use and has no visible logos or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two reflective silver stripes and a clean, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_1: Side view similar to the front, with the reflective stripes and base clearly visible, showing minor surface scuffs.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, highlighting the same features with slightly different lighting on the reflective stripes.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with both reflective stripes and the square base visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal reflective silver stripes encircle the upper and middle sections of the cone. Both stripes are of similar width and are positioned parallel to each other.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features beyond its smooth, conical shape.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and thick, made of the same orange plastic as the cone. It is slightly raised at the edges for stability and has a smooth surface with minor scuff marks.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: Lightly used, with some visible scuff marks, dirt, and minor weathering on the reflective stripes.
